title: Can I get a notification on MS Teams when there is an update on a subtask?

posts.author: VeronikaKunova (Veronika Kunova)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,
I have a quation about MS Teams integration. I need to get notification in Teams channel when an update is created on a subtask. But it only works for tasks.

I used formulas: “When an update is posted in _, send it to _ in _.” and “When any update is posted, send it to _ in _”. These work only for when there is an update on a task. Is there any way I can get notified when I post an update on a subtask?

Thank you!
